description: Synthetic SnibeLis ASTM E1394 query/order-download exchange seed for MAGLUMI X3: Q-3 sample ID uses ^<id>, host answers with H/P/O/L and repeated ^^^ assay identifiers. NOT a real instrument capture.

source.reference: synthetic seed (LIS-108 / S3.0a); SnibeLis LIS User Manual v1.1 Appendix A Network Interface, Request Assay / Return Assay examples
source.note: Application payload only. The SnibeLis simulator applies the manual's simplified ENQ/STX/content/ETX/EOT envelope. Live SnibeLis capture must confirm whether query/order download is enabled at the site and whether framing is simplified or full E1381. channel.tcp.port 12021 mirrors the planned dedicated X3 listener (LIS-174 plan D3, org.itech.ahb.listen-astm-server.snibe); channel.identity analyzer_id/host_id ('Maglumi User'/'Lis') are vision-extracted vendor-doc screenshot values, unverified — LIS-75 bench capture pins all of these (LIS-175).
